svg.title: llm-bench Benchmark Workflow
svg.desc: End-to-end workflow of the llm-bench inference benchmark tool, from CLI input through measurement to output.
svg.text: loads model weights into GPU VRAM · removes cold-start bias
for model × mode × prompt × shot (Semaphore concurrency=1 — strictly serial)
